text: The wrist articulation exercises are designed to provide an understanding and comfortability with the wrist articulation hand controls.

Wrist articulation one is simplified so that the user is solely focused on figuring out the best way to articulate the controls in order to touch the sphere inside the glass globe without coming in contact with it.
The user straightens the surgical instrument while passing through the opening of the glass globe, carefully avoiding contact with the edges and minimizing pressure on the glass surface.

Also, holding the hand controls with the tips of the fingers and at the more distal portion of the controls really allows you to maximize the degrees of freedom by which you use the wrist articulation mechanism.
You can see that in the left upper portion of the screen.
By avoiding touching the edges or applying pressure directly to the glass globe, you can complete this task without incurring any penalties.
